title: Maris Super Secret Pantyshot
wikitext:
[]: Mari's Super Secret Pantyshot (In Trailer So Spoilers Is No)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 27, 2009 4:07 pm 'Course I'm not the first person to notice this, but I'm sharing it with those less fortunate of you anyway. I watched the 720p version of the making of 1.01 featurette yesterday and found that it showed two separate takes of the Mari shot at the end of the mockup 2.0 preview. I couldn't tell the difference between them until I took a screenshot from each and compared them. The first and most noticeable difference is that, in the second version, the birds are behind the giant crosses instead of in front of them, meaning those are some huuuuge freaking birds. The second difference is as follows: First Take Second Take Looking back at the different takes, certain enough, they redid the entire animation of Mari's skirt blowing in the wind so that her panties are visible in the second one. I didn't remember seeing them at all in the version used in the actual movie, but sure enough: Second Take² It's all completely visible, but by the time the shot made it into the actual movie, the animators watched some Benny Hill or something for research on British undergarments and discovered that they're often darker than their Japanese counterparts. This explains why I never noticed before, especially because you can't even tell when watching 1.01: Second Take² (SUCK) Interestingly, despite bothering to redo the whole skirt animation to make sure the underwear is exposed in the preview, the decision was reversed by the time the equivalent shot in the actual movie was done: Spaghetti Aaand that's my post.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 27, 2009 4:10 pm "I see London, I see France, I see Mari's..."
